properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My heart is filled with songs of praise You gave me hope, You made a way Now I long to live in your presence For all of my days

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My soul sings, my spirit shouts With every breath I'm crying out I want to live for You alone You have captured my heart, Mi corazón

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Amazing grace has rescued me You paid the price, You set me free I will sing Your praises forever My Savior and King

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My soul sings, my spirit shouts With every breath I'm crying out I want to live for You alone You have captured my heart, Mi corazón Lord I give you my whole heart, Mi corazón

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I will give You glory Tell the wondrous story How You rescued me I'm the guilty one But You sacrificed Your Son Your One and Only Now I stand before You blameless and Holy
